title: corybas villosus
intro: Corybas villosus is a type of orchid plant, specifically a terrestrial orchid native to the tropical regions of Australia and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its reported antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Corybas villosus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Corybas villosus is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
